name: tokenbbq
description: Local dashboard for AI coding CLI token usage, estimated costs, and project/model breakdowns
author: offbyone1

scripts.build: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && node scripts/inline-vendor.mjs && tsdown && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.mjs','dist/index.js')"
scripts.dev: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && node scripts/inline-vendor.mjs && node --import tsx src/index.ts
scripts.lint: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && node scripts/inline-vendor.mjs && tsc --noEmit
